caption: The video features a presentation by Jerry Michalski, who is seen in a small window on the right side of the screen. The main focus of the video is a complex, interconnected diagram displayed on a black background. This diagram consists of various circular nodes, each labeled with different concepts such as "awaken," "systems thinking," "model sharing," and "future of society." These nodes are connected by arrows, illustrating relationships and pathways between the concepts. The diagram appears to be part of a larger discussion or educational session, possibly related to systems thinking, problem-solving, and societal change. Jerry seems to be explaining or guiding viewers through this intricate network of ideas, highlighting the interconnectedness of various elements in addressing complex issues.
